description: Create a GitLab CI configuration that defines three hidden jobs: .private_runner_test which sets the runner tags to docker and samba-ci-private; .shared_runner_build which defines a variable SAMBA_SHARED_RUNNER_BUILD_DUMMY_VARIABLE with value shared_runner_build; and .shared_runner_test which extends .shared_runner_build to inherit its variable. No stages, Docker image, services, script commands, caches, artifacts, or deployment rules are specified.
